cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking which description about Yves Gomes is true based on the provided text. First, I need to go through each option and check against the information given in the text. Option A says he was born in India before his parents immigrated illegally. The text mentions that he was taken to the U.S. by his parents when he was 14 months old and they were deported more than a year ago. But does it say he was born in India? It says he was deported to India, so he was born in the U.S. because he is an illegal immigrant who grew up there. So A is false. Option B states his parents were forced to leave India more than a year ago. The text says they were deported more than a year ago, but that they were deported to India. So he left with them when he was 14 months old. The parents were in the U.S. illegally and were deported, not leaving India. So B is incorrect. Option C says he wants to finish school in America and become a nurse in India after graduation. But in the text, Gomes says he wants to finish school and become a doctor in the U.S., not go back to India. So C is wrong. Option
